name: base
desc:
Flutter base project — production boilerplate built on BLoC/Cubit,
GoRouter, Material 3 theming, and multi-flavor Firebase support.

name: rootNavigatorKey
desc: Root NavigatorState key shared between AppRouter and route builders.

name: routes
desc: Top-level route list consumed by GoRouter.

name: shellKey
desc: Key for the StatefulNavigationShell that hosts the bottom-nav branches.
